source.fires: USDA Forest Service FPA-FOD national fire-occurrence database (Short, K.C.), public NIFC ArcGIS service. NASA FIRMS is the intended primary for India; host unreachable from this network, FPA-FOD substituted (agency ground truth, 1992-2018).
source.weather: ERA5 daily fire weather (Open-Meteo historical archive)
source.license: open data, free APIs, no key
